doc: PROPOSED taste distillations from Mohamed's verdict stream — nothing here auto-applies; n_items>=2 bar per RABIE; unmatched notes listed so no founder word is silently outside the analysis

proposals.proposed: family scene is worn — demand scene diversity per week (no repeated emotional core)
his_words: The concept is good but stilll its around the family on the house
Very normal and still using the family story
We need to make the posts different so for example if the idea is family they can’t use it for all the posts
Is it all family
The caption is good and safe but still only family ideas
Really good for the location but still we need to move from family meeting

proposals.proposed: judge cards must carry the FULL post (occasion/idea/visual/reasoning) — bare captions are unjudgeable
his_words: i need to see the captions with the breif and image and story and creitve
i need to see the photo the ocassion and the idea and the creitve and the resinning behind the full post not the captions
need the full post anylisses with the important data to judge
When you write captions without knowing what is the client and what is the detail like idea creative and photo I can’t judge good
proposals.enforcement: judge cards v2 carry the full post since June 12

proposals.proposed: safe-but-flat is a REJECTION class — brains must take one concrete creative risk per caption (his bar: safe ≠ approved)
his_words: To small not creative
To safe and still using احلي مع
جيده للشريحه الموجهه بس مفيش ابداع في الكابشن ولا المشهد
proposals.enforcement: brain-prompt work — needs keys + his Phase 2 batch

proposals.proposed: «good for safe side content» is a TIER, not a rejection — label safe-lane recipes so the mix is deliberate (safe posts have a place, never the whole week)
his_words: Good for safe side content
Good as safe side content
Safe
proposals.enforcement: tier field on recipes awaits his taxonomy ruling

proposals.proposed: every scene element must have a stated link to the brand — he asks «what's the relation between X and the brand» when a prop is decorative
his_words: hيه العلاقه بين حارات وجريشه
saudi dosent have evergreen but the idea is good and ليه حارات ومازا تعني في السياق
proposals.enforcement: angle-stage check — prompt work, needs keys

proposals.proposed: find emotion triggers WITHOUT manufactured sentimentality (his: «better way to trigger emotions»)
his_words: very good but why ( بذات التجربه (
We need to find better way to trigger emotions without make it obvious about the people we missed as died

proposals.proposed: corporate-positivity phrases (يرفع المعنويات) and cliché imagery read FLAT to him — same rejection class as too-safe
his_words: why يرفع المعنويات dosent feel good
the caption is clishy
proposals.enforcement: يرفع المعنويات in STANDING_WORN; full cliché class needs prompt work (keys)

proposals.proposed: connect to the target audience by AGE and PRICE BAND — he needs the audience organ to say who can afford the client before judging fit
his_words: For specific Clint’s you need to find a way to connect to target oudunace maybe by age by price you need to know who can do this for engagement only small place
Good for the target oduance but we need to change the language to match the الشريحه المستهدفه
proposals.enforcement: audience_mirror organ fields await client/founder input

proposals.proposed: delivery-app CTAs fatigued — cap app mentions per week
his_words: We need to make sure that we can use the delivery app to much
Ok we need to stop using the app

weak_signals_n1.proposed: captions may only name products in the client's truth pack — his falafel catch is the standing evidence
his_words: Dose Al bio have falafel ?
Dose almbike have falafel

weak_signals_n1.proposed: evidence row for the standing law (already enforced)
his_words: A brand can’t ask who is better than him he is Al west the best no comparing

weak_signals_n1.proposed: evidence row for the standing law (already enforced)
his_words: We most make the duoble meaning does not contain any sexual joke or humiliation for any one

weak_signals_n1.proposed: captions for Saudi clients must read SAUDI — Egyptian/Levantine markers (مش/عايز/ازاي/كده/بتاع/دلوقتي) are a hard flag (his: «عدل الكابشن … ومش سعودي»)
his_words: عدل الكابشن الكتبابه غلط ومش سعودي

weak_signals_n1.proposed: client name leads every judged card
his_words: You need to say the client name and we afreed the full test is for the 3 Clint only

weak_signals_n1.proposed: deepen brand DNA + strategy organs BEFORE caption/idea work — creative quality is downstream of profile depth (his ruling: 3 pilot clients only)
his_words: We need to work more on the brand dna and strategy before we start the caption and the idea so work more on the creaitvie and only for the 3 Clint’s

weak_signals_n1.proposed: dialect double-meaning screen: when he flags a word, it enters the cultural gate same-day
his_words: Ok we can’t use the word سدر it means boobs on the culture so we need to check alll the sixul words or the words that can be sixcual

weak_signals_n1.proposed: enforce per-week idea-core diversity: consecutive slots must not share emotional core
his_words: We need to make the posts different so for example if the idea is family they can’t use it for all the posts
weak_signals_n1.enforcement: diversity_prefer — repeated core sinks, fresh core leads

weak_signals_n1.proposed: extend the standing worn list when he names a phrase (already: لحظة/يجمعنا/احلي مع …)
his_words: To safe and still using احلي مع

weak_signals_n1.proposed: audience-fit is rated separately from creativity in his notes — track both axes
his_words: جيده للشريحه الموجهه بس مفيش ابداع في الكابشن ولا المشهد

weak_signals_n1.proposed: religious surfaces: people-first framing, never product-first (his words: «about the people not the product»)
his_words: When it comes to religion we need to play it very safe and to make it about the people not the product

unmatched_notes: if the photo have a kid so yeah its a good caption
check the occasion saudi dosent have evergreen
The captain is not that good but it’s ok
I need to know in which direction and for how and which sector to be able to judge
Good for small Bussnies with low prices range
